units.description: Add UserGreeting component that displays a personalized time-of-day greeting using the current user's first name

test_criteria.description: When current hour is 8, greeting shows 'Good morning, {name}'
Component returns null when no user is authenticated
Displays 'Hello!' when user has no first name

test_strategy.unit_tests: Test greeting logic in isolation + component rendering with mocked auth
test_strategy.e2e_tests: Verify greeting appears on homepage after login (deferred to QA)

architecture_notes: Use existing useAuth hook for user context. Greeting logic extracted to a utility for testability.
